title: Spicy Syrian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish using Syrian spices, perfect for a quick dinner. Serve with rice or noodles for a filling meal.

ingredients.name: Syrian pepper
ingredients.notes: or substitute with similar spice blend

ingredients.name: Spicy sauce
ingredients.notes: or make your own with hot sauce and vinegar

ingredients.name: Silky tofu
ingredients.notes: extra-firm or firm tofu works best

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: vegetable or canola oil for stir-frying

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: use sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the red bell pepper and Syrian pepper and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add the silky tofu and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the spicy sauce and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Season with soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped green onions or cilantro, if desired.
